uplink.description: current-state frame (fPort 1): temperature 22.5C, humidity 55%, mag switch count 3, orientation YH, activity HIGH, impact event set
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame. fPort 129 = LAST_BLOCK encoding of frame type 1 (current-state); status byte 0x52 = orientation YH | activity HIGH | impact_evnt. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (temperature 22.5, humidity 55, mag_sw_cnt_u8 3, activity_state HIGH, impact_evnt 1) and applying our normalization (mV/percent extras, action.motion).

Synthetic multi-frame uplink. fPort 138 = frame type 10 (last-temp), then frame-type delta byte 130 (0x82, LAST_BLOCK value 2) advances 10->12 (last-humid). expected.data from running reference/upstream-codec.js (temperature 22.5, humidity 60).
Synthetic in-bounds frame exercising signed f8.8 temperature. 0xFA80 little-endian = -1408 / 256 = -5.5C. expected.data from running reference/upstream-codec.js.

Synthetic in-bounds frame. fPort 135 = frame type 7 (motion-events): impact_cnt u32 = 5, free_fall_cnt u32 = 2. expected.data from running reference/upstream-codec.js, normalized to action.motion.count + freeFallCount extra.
Synthetic in-bounds frame. fPort 149 = frame type 21 (dev-health): battery_mv u16 = 0x0B88 = 2952 mV. expected.data from running reference/upstream-codec.js, normalized to volts (battery = 2.952).
Synthetic error case. fPort 168 = LAST_BLOCK encoding of frame type 40, which has no decoder. Reference/upstream-codec.js returns errors: ['Invalid key: 40'].
